name: Arnie
description_en: Arnie is a hexplosive handler who works with Ziggs as his assistant. His jobs include inspecting the hexplosive munitions, extinguishing fires and covering Ziggs' ears near explosions due to him forgetting hearing protection.
description_fr: Arnie est un gestionnaire d'explosifs qui travaille avec Ziggs comme assistant. Ses tâches consistent à inspecter les munitions explosives, à éteindre les incendies et à couvrir les oreilles de Ziggs à proximité des explosions car il a oublié sa protection auditive.
